Class-Sorcerer 20 — Male Human Sorcerer: 20
Strength: 16 (+3) Dexterity: 14 (+2) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 9 (-1) Wisdom: 8 (-1) Charisma: 17 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Neutral Deity: Celtic-Dunatis (N)
Ability Boosts: Dexterity Experience: 386951/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 240/480
Ability Notes:
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Weapon Master: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Ability Boosts: 1 to distribute
Magical Guidance: Can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a failed ability check
Revelation In Flesh: Can use a bonus action and spend 1 sorcery point to gain a 30' fly Speed, a 60' swim Speed and water breathing, or the ability to squeeze through a 1" space, for 10 min
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Metamagic): 4; Sorcerer (Sorcerous Origin): 1
Feats: Dual Wielder; Elemental Adept (Cold); Elemental Adept (Fire); Elemental Adept (Thunder); Weapon Master Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Sorcerer Features: Aberrant Mind; Bastion Of Law; Clockwork Cavalcade; Clockwork Magic; Clockwork Soul; Empowered Spell; Font Of Magic; Heightened Spell; Magical Guidance; Metamagic; Psionic Sorcery; Psionic Spells; Psychic Defenses; Restore Balance; Revelation In Flesh; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Seeking Spell; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerous Origin; Sorcerous Restoration; Sorcerous Versatility; Spellcasting; Subtle Spell; Telepathic Speech; Trance Of Order; Transmuted Spell; Warping Implosion; Weapon Proficiency (Dagger; Dart; Sling; Quarterstaff; Light Crossbow) Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Metamagic: 4 selections
Sorcerous Origin: 1 selection
Clockwork Magic: Displays a physical manifestation of Clockwork Soul
Revelation In Flesh: Can use a bonus action and spend 1 sorcery point to see invisible creatures within 60' for 10 min
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Celtic-Dunatis and fellow believers
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +5 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) -1 Intimidation: (cha) +9 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) -1 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) -1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) -1 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) -1 Perception: (wis) -1 Survival: (wis) -1
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; Insight; Intimidation; Religion
Languages: Common; Goblin; Halfling; Primordial
Skill Notes: Telepathic Speech: R30' Can use a bonus action to gain telepathic communication with the target in a shared language while within 3 miles for 20 min
Combat
Hit Points: 85 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 12
Weapon Proficiency: Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Maul; Morningstar; Quarterstaff; Sling; Spear; Warhammer
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+9 1d4+3 P R20/60); Light Crossbow (+8 1d8+2 P R80/320); Unarmed Strike (+9 1+3 B); Unarmed
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Weapon Master: Weapon Proficiency (Choose 4 from any Simple Weapon, any Martial Weapon)
Bastion Of Law: R30' Can spend 1 - 5 sorcery points to negate an equal number of d8s HP damage to the target before the next use or long rest
Dual Wielder: +1 Armor Class when wielding two melee weapons/Can use two-weapon fighting with any one-handed weapons/Can draw or stow two one-handed weapons simultaneously
Restore Balance: R60' Can use a reaction to cancel a target's advantage or disadvantage on a roll 6 times per long rest
Trance Of Order: Can use a bonus action to negate advantage on attacks on self and to score a minimum of 10 on attack, ability, and save rolls for 1 min once per long rest; can spend 5 sorcery points for each additional use
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +9; Constitution: +6; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: -1; Strength: +3; Wisdom: -1
Save Notes: Psychic Defenses: Has resistance to psychic damage and advantage vs. charmed and frightened
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: S0: 6; S: 15 Spell Slots: S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 3; S6: 2; S7: 2; S8: 1; S9: 1 Attack: S: +9 Spell DC: S: 17
Spells:
Aid (S2 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr (+Level gives +5 hit points)
Alarm (S1 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Minute) R30' Entry into a 20' cube by a non-designated Tiny or larger creature triggers an audible or mental alarm for 8 hr [R]
Arms Of Hadar (S1 [Psionic Spells] Conj): (Action) 10' radius inflicts 2d6 HP necrotic and loss of reactions until the target's next turn (save Strength half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Blade Ward (S0 Abju): (Action) Self gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing weapon damage for 1 rd
Burning Hands (S1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and lights unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Calm Emotions (S2 [Psionic Spells] Ench): (Action) R60' 20' radius suppresses a choice of charmed and frightened or hostility (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; harm to a target of suppressed hostility or its allies ends the effects on that target
Chromatic Orb (S1 Evoc): (Action) R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Cone Of Cold (S5 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Confusion (S4 Ench): (Action) R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the radius by 5')
Creation (S5 Illu): (Minute) R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting 1 day (vegetable matter), 12 hr (stone or crystal), 1 hr (precious metals), 10 min (gems), or 1 min (adamantine or mithral) (+Level creates a +5' cube)
Crown Of Madness (S2 Ench): (Action) R120' Self can direct the target humanoid's attacks (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Darkvision (S2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched sees 60' in darkness for 8 hr
Detect Thoughts (S2 [Psionic Spells] Divi): (Action) R30' Detects the presence of minds or reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom negates; additional contested Intelligence attempts each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 2' of rock, 2" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Disintegrate (S6 Tran): (Action) R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force (+Level inflicts +3d6 HP)
Dispel Magic (S3 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dissonant Whispers (S1 [Psionic Spells] Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and forces the target to use its reaction to flee (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Dominate Beast (S4 Ench): (Action) R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7)
Dominate Person (S5 Ench): (Action) R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8)
Evard's Black Tentacles (S4 [Psionic Spells] Conj): (Action) R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain, 3d6 HP bludgeoning, and restrained (save Dexterity negates, additional Strength or Dexterity checks each rd break free) for concentration up to 1 min
Fire Storm (S7 Evoc): (Action) R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Freedom Of Movement (S4 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Friends (S0 Ench): (Action) Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Greater Invisibility (S4 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Restoration (S5 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Hunger Of Hadar (S3 [Psionic Spells] Conj): (Action) R150' Creatures in a 20' radius suffer 2d6 HP cold at the start of their turns (no save) and 2d6 HP acid at the end of their turns (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Incendiary Cloud (S8 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Lesser Restoration (S2 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Mage Armor (S1 Abju): (Action) Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Major Image (S3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (contact or Investigation detects) that can be changed and moved for concentration up to 10 min (+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 6)
Message (S0 Tran): (Action) R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 3' of wood, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Mind Sliver (S0 [Psionic Spells] Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts 4d6 HP psychic and -1d4 on the target's next save before the end of the next turn (save Intelligence negates)
Move Earth (S6 Tran): (Action) R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 min for concentration up to 2 hr
Plane Shift (S7 Conj): (Action) Target (save Charisma negates) or self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Poison Spray (S0 Conj): (Action) R10' Inflicts 4d12 HP poison (save Constitution negates)
Prestidigitation (S0 Tran): (Action) R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Protection From Energy (S3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (S3 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Evil And Good (S1 [Clockwork Magic] Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Rary's Telepathic Bond (S5 [Psionic Spells] Divi): (Action) R30' 8 willing targets can communicate telepathically for 1 hr [R]
Scorching Ray (S2 Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire (+Level gives +1 ranged attack)
Sending (S3 [Psionic Spells] Evoc): (Action) Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Shield (S1 Abju): (Reaction) Cast when taking damage, gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shocking Grasp (S0 Evoc): (Action) Touch inflicts 4d8 HP lightning and loss of reactions until the target's next turn
Sleet Storm (S3 Conj): (Action) R150' 40' radius becomes heavily obscured, douses exposed flames, becomes difficult terrain, and inflicts prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Summon Aberration (S4 [Psionic Spells] Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient aberrant spirit (Armor Class 15; 40 hit points; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type beholderkin (R150' inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic; fly 30'), slaad (inflicts 1d10+7 HP slashing and negates healing for 1 rd; regenerates 5 hit points per rd), or star spawn (inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic, plus 2d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) in a 5' radius) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Construct (S4 [Clockwork Magic] Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient construct spirit (Armor Class 17; 40 hit points; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d8+8 bludgeoning) of clay (attacks an adjacent creature or moves 15' as a reaction to damage), metal (inflicts 1d10 HP fire on adjacent melee attackers), or stone (can inflict half Speed and loss of reactions (save Wisdom negates) on creatures within 10') for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and attack damage by 1)
Telekinesis (S5 [Psionic Spells] Tran): (Action) R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or 1000 lb object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Time Stop (S9 Tran): (Action) Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Wall Of Force (S5 [Clockwork Magic] Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x1/4" impassable force panels or a 10' radius impassible force dome or globe for concentration up to 10 min; the effect extends into the ethereal plane
Magic Notes:
Clockwork Cavalcade: 30' cube restores 100 hit points total among targets, repairs damaged objects, and dispels target spells up to 6th level once per long rest; can spend 7 sorcery points for each additional use
Elemental Adept (Cold): Spells that inflict cold damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Fire): Spells that inflict fire damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Spells that inflict thunder damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Empowered Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll 3 spell damage dice; can be used in addition to another Metamagic option
Font Of Magic: Can use 20 sorcery points per long rest and can use a bonus action to convert between sorcery points and spell slots
Heightened Spell: Can spend 3 sorcery points to inflict disadvantage on a target's initial save vs. a self spell
Psionic Sorcery: Can cast a Psionic Spells spell using sorcery points equal to the spell level and no verbal or somatic components
Seeking Spell: Can spend 2 sorcery points to reroll a missed spell attack; can be used in addition to another Metamagic option
Sorcerous Restoration: Taking a short rest restores 4 sorcery points
Sorcerous Versatility: Can replace a Metamagic option or a cantrip when boosting an ability or taking a feat
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Subtle Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without somatic or verbal components
Transmuted Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to change an acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder spell's damage type to another from that list
Warping Implosion: Can teleport 120', inflicting 3d10 HP force and a 30' pull (save Strength half HP only) in a 30' radius around the starting position, once per long rest; can spend 5 sorcery points per additional use
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 5 available vs. 7 allocated
